title: Groww Stock Hits Record High, Up 20% in 3 Days
description: Groww Parent Company Shares Soar to Record High Billionbrains Garage Ventures, parent to brokerage firm Groww, witnessed a significant surge in share value, hitting a new all-time high of ₹197.50 on the BSE Friday. The stock has rallied for three consecutive sessions, gaining roughly 20%. Market Share: Groww commands 28% of the market share in [...]

title: Doctor convicted in attempted murder
description: HONOLULU -- A Hawaii anesthesiologist who was accused of trying to murder his wife on a scenic cliffside hike with ocean views last year has been convicted of the lesser charge of attempted manslaughter.

title: Investors flood BlackRock Bitcoin Trust with $269 million inflows in United States ETF market surge
description: [»] Jump to Summary... After a brief lull, money is flowing back into Bitcoin exchange-traded funds in a big way. On Thursday, investors pushed a massive $269.3 million into iShares Bitcoin Trust, marking its strongest single-day performance in weeks. The surge didn’t just lift one fund—it helped reverse two straight days of outflows across the [...]

title: Industry expresses concern after unreleased Vijay film ‘Jana Nayagan’ leaked online
description: On Friday morning, several social media posts began circulating, showing that high-quality prints of the film were being uploaded to piracy platforms. Initially, short clips of around 5–10 minutes surfaced online on Thursday night.

title: Artemis II Splashdown: When To Watch Friday — After 16-Minute Blackout
description: When to see NASA’s Artemis astronauts splashdown after their 10-day moon mission, but not before their Orion spacecraft heats to 5,000°F during a 16-minute blackout.
